name: opsec-pro
description: Opsec PRO — Dynamic Discord Automation & Protection Toolkit

scripts.build:electron: npx esbuild electron/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --packages=external --minify --outfile=dist-electron/main.js && npx esbuild electron/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --packages=external --minify --outfile=dist-electron/preload.js
scripts.build: echo Opsec PRO Release && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 npm run build:client && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 npm run build:electron
scripts.obfuscate: javascript-obfuscator dist-electron --output dist-electron --compact true --self-defending false --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 0.75 && javascript-obfuscator dist/assets --output dist/assets --compact true --self-defending false --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 0.75
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run obfuscate && node scripts/compile-bytecode.js --clean && electron-builder

author: ellecrydansmesdm
